男主无心，没有感情，别信他的鬼话。
两个副本已完结，请放心追更，求不养书(◞‸◟ )

他从列车上醒来，脑海里只剩一句话：
“陈好，你该活着——只要你还活着，我们就不会输。”

当他半只脚踏入鬼门关，却肆意的笑着烧毁了大楼...
当他面临神明的不公平审判，他说，既然如此，我们弑神吧...

这一路走来陈好听说过曙光的不凡事迹，听说过那位曾经一力抵挡乐园的伟大，听说那位也叫旅者，听说那人是所有玩家的白月光，是无人可及的存在。

当陈好顶着旅者的名号出现在众人面前时，所有人都在嘲笑，他怎么配用这个名号，他哪来的脸敢称自己为旅者。
直到最神秘的“大祭司”出现，双眼通红的望着陈好，三大顶级势力的高玩们齐齐单膝下跪，曙光小队尊敬的恭迎，重新为他戴上王冠。
原来“旅者”从来都是一个人，原来做小丑的只是他们啊，这时候说对不起还来得及吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/efb72718b27d4690169f405381c1feb0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"莫罗凉茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7599119993745181758","book_name":"无限流：你怎么又在boss窝里","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599126881568293400","read_count":"537","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"242567"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"112","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,灵异,副本,无限流,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/efb72718b27d4690169f405381c1feb0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184609&x-signature=kSvff9JrmwIU4g89q%2FIgpNFjrBk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1978744803965416","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"63"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017564942FF3785697EE9973ECB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_cou
